title: centaurea montana
intro: Centaurea montana, also known as mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea montana include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Centaurea montana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
